narrative: US-Iran tensions and a hawkish Fed outlook are likely to support the US Dollar, setting up EUR/USD to weaken at the open from Friday's close of 1.139; USD/JPY is likely to extend gains on geopolitical risk premium from Friday's close of 161.69. The upcoming US labor market test, including NFP, will be a key focus for the week, and any positive surprise could further support the USD, likely to pressure AUD/USD from Friday's close of 0.6901.
